Class FeignClientBuilder.Builder<T>

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.openfeign.FeignClientBuilder.Builder<T>
Type Parameters:
T - type of target
Enclosing class:
FeignClientBuilder
public static final class FeignClientBuilder.Builder<T> extends Object
Builder of feign targets.
Author:
Sven Döring, Matt King, Sam Kruglov, Olga Maciaszek-Sharma

  • Method Details

    • url

      public FeignClientBuilder.Builder<T> url(String url)

    • customize

      public FeignClientBuilder.Builder<T> customize(FeignBuilderCustomizer customizer)
      Applies a FeignBuilderCustomizer to the underlying Feign.Builder. May be called multiple times.
      Parameters:
      customizer - applied in the same order as supplied here after applying customizers found in the context.
      Returns:
      the FeignClientBuilder.Builder with the customizer added

    • contextId

      public FeignClientBuilder.Builder<T> contextId(String contextId)

    • path

      public FeignClientBuilder.Builder<T> path(String path)

    • dismiss404

      public FeignClientBuilder.Builder<T> dismiss404(boolean dismiss404)

    • inheritParentContext

      public FeignClientBuilder.Builder<T> inheritParentContext(boolean inheritParentContext)

    • fallback

      public FeignClientBuilder.Builder<T> fallback(Class<? extends T> fallback)

    • build

      public T build()
      Returns:
      the created Feign client
